what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment: it declares an attachment (att-a9376b25) in the design-source channel, of type images, pointing to the image asset image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-04, and records when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a custom URI scheme 'image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-04'
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
no body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: Custom image:// URI scheme for the target asset
Typed attachment record linking a channel to a design image
conventions: Identifier prefix 'att-' followed by a hash
concerns: File contains only metadata; no description, title, or author for the attachment
Target URI scheme is not resolvable from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment pointer that ties an image asset to the design-source channel with a timestamp and typed reference.
questions: What does 'p-04' represent — a slide, page, or artboard?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the image:// URI resolvable elsewhere in the system?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a typed, timestamped attachment record; there is no explicit stated purpose beyond the fields it contains, and it matches that role.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific image from a 2026 design deck is attached to the design-source channel, making the asset discoverable through the channel.
novelty: The use of an 'image://' URI scheme to address a page-level asset within a deck is a distinct convention.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to a specific image asset, enabling attachment tracking without embedding the asset itself.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record (att-a9376b25) in the design-source channel that references the image asset image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-04 and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: To record the association of deck1-2026 page 04 image with the design-source channel on 2026-06-22.
